title: varronia urticacea
intro: Varronia urticacea, also known as the sand olive or yellow elder, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Varronia urticacea include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Varronia urticacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
